speaker: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
text: A wealth tax should be implemented expeditiously and shouldn't wait for any one president; the moderator added that the US is uniquely placed to do so because citizenship-based taxation prevents capital flight.
context: Asked whether she would impose a wealth tax if she ran for president.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
